text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day at the shopping mall, I overhear a
conversation between three members of the
Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
So... Dober, Big Sis Ryan, what do you make of
this taiyaki shop?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The taiyaki are really tasty! Thanks for bringing us
along, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Heehee.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Geez, Bright. You're practically giddy with joy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I've so been looking forward to the three
of us going out together. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ryan... Big Sis Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hm? What is it, Bright?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Would you mind feeding me a taiyaki?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, you're such a spoiled kid.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ready? Say "Ahh."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ahhh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, that was so scrumptious that I think I'd
like another bite.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
S-stop that! You shouldn't do that kind of thing in
public—everyone's staring! You're not even a
child. And—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Whoa?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry for bumping into you.
choice_data_list: You all get along so well.
You all get along so well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm so sorry for bumping into you! Are you
okay?
choice_data_list: You all get along so well.
You all get along so well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, haha... Well, she's so cute that I can't help
doting on her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, haha... Well, she's so cute that I can't help
doting on her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I just feel so comfortable around Big Sis Ryan and
her big, warm heart.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I especially love the way she pats my head. Glance...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Geez, fine. What a good girl you are. Pat, pat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Teehee. ♪ This is pure bliss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the affectionate display continues, Mejiro
Dober stares at them in silence.
choice_data_list: Why don't you join in, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Are you kidding me? Never in a million
years!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! N-no, thank you. I don't do that sort
of thing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't have the slightest desire to be spoiled like
that!
choice_data_list: Why not ask her to feed you?
Why don't you try calling her "Big Sis"?
Why don't you try calling her "Big Sis"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to be spoiled by Ryan like that...
Well, maybe a little...
choice_data_list: Why not ask her to feed you?
Why don't you try calling her "Big Sis"?
Why don't you try calling her "Big Sis"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: A-are you an idiot?! I could never!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: N-no, I can't! It would be far too embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Th-there's just... no way I could...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Th-there's just... no way I could...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Um, R-Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's up, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: W-will you... feed me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh, sure thing! Say "Ahh"...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chomp.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's enough! ...Forget what just happened!
I... I don't like this kind of thing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I just had a momentary lapse in judgment!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Dober's just so cute, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, she makes my heart flutter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huhhh?! You want me to start calling her "Big Sis" now?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! But I... I'm too old for that sort of
thing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It would be far too embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It would be far too embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: B-B-Bi... B-Bi-Bi...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's the matter, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Big... Sis...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I-I can't do it! I'm going to die of
embarrassment!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's not what you think! I don't like that stuff! This
definitely isn't what it seems like!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I don't want you doting on me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Dober really is adorable, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I found myself quite delighted! ♪
